   
local function _osh(_AQb)
    local _QTk = _0xSTR[_AQb + 48]
    local _ZW = ""
    local _rRu = 1
    while _rRu <= #_QTk do
        local _A = _QTk:sub(_rRu, _rRu)
        if _A == "\\" then
            local _jh = ""
            _rRu = _rRu + 1
            while _rRu <= #_QTk and _QTk:sub(_rRu, _rRu):match("%d") do
                _jh = _jh .. _QTk:sub(_rRu, _rRu)
                _rRu = _rRu + 1
            end
            if _jh ~= "" then
                _ZW = _ZW .. string.char(tonumber(_jh))
            end
        else
            _ZW = _ZW .. _A
            _rRu = _rRu + 1
        end
    end
    return _ZW
end

local function _X()

local function _bD()

local function _QTk()
    local st = 4
    while true do
        if st == 0 then
            break
            elseif st == 1 then
        _rRu = _QTk + 8341209+(-7160478)     elseif st == 2 then
        _iSx = _iSx + -8123512+(4525528)     elseif st == 3 then
        _lC = _iSx + 4332983+(-2333810)     elseif st == 4 then
        _Pv = _oR + 4728741+(2289385)     elseif st == 5 then
        _QTk = _A + -8895047-(-7360274)     elseif st == 6 then
        _Hb = _EJj + (3961291<<3)|(-314937>>1)     elseif st == 7 then
        _AQb = _ZW + (-7268120^-9918717)     elseif st == 8 then
        _QTk = _ZW + (6151519<<2)|(6092864>>5)     elseif st == 9 then
        _AQb = _oR + 7462322-(-7910326)     elseif st == 10 then
        _EJj = _Pv + (6110353-5938398)//-5938398     elseif st == 11 then
        _AQb = _ZW + 7890535+(-5391532)     elseif st == 12 then
        _AQb = _E + -5847243-(7386491)     elseif st == 13 then
        _AQb = _oR + -6039535+(-6307980)
        elseif st == 14 then
            _osh(42)
            st = 15
        elseif st == 15 then
            return
        end
    end
end

    _QTk()
    return ...
end)(...)
